title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 106.130 - Depositions
text:
106.130.  Depositions. — The president of the commission or the chief justice of the supreme court, as the case may be, on application of the respondent, or any of his counsel, or either of the managers, shall issue subpoenas for witnesses and commissions to take depositions where the witness is unable to attend from sickness or other infirmity, or where the witness is without the state.
(RSMo 1939 § 12843, A.L. 1945 p. 1319 § 12847) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11217; 1919 § 9190; 1909 § 10219
